repo_id.description: Repository identifier using the owner__repo convention.

commit.description: Source repository commit used to generate this document.

document_id.description: Stable ID for this design document, usually {topic_slug}_{n}.

generator.description: Tool or model that generated the document.

prompt_version.description: Prompt template version used to generate the document.

document.description: The prose document text consumed by the SHINE eval script.
